chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 746 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 03.06.2025 M/s Syed Zaffar Ali Shah Bukhari and Athar Hussain Abro, Advocates for petitioner. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Pursuant to order dated 23.05.2025, Abdul Hameed Shaikh, Executive Engineer (Civil), SEPCO, Sukkur, appeared and submitted that SEPCO Tender No. SEPCO/CWD-09/2024-25, which was published in newspapers and uploaded on PPRA website on 09.05.2025, has been cancelled on technical grounds in the interest of the company. A copy of cancellation notice dated 30.05.2025 has been filed under the cover of statement submitted by learned DAG, which is taken on record. Learned DAG submits that in view of the cancellation of the tender, the present petition has become infructuous. When confronted with this legal position, the learned Counsel for the petitioner chose not to press this petition. In view of the above, this petition stands dismissed as not pressed, having become infructuous. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
